name: openai
title: OpenAI API client

files.reason: Workers-safe OpenAI client (the SDK uses fetch; no Node APIs required)

nextActions: Optional: route through Cloudflare AI Gateway by setting baseURL
doc:
# Flarecel catalog: OpenAI (Cloudflare Workers)

Uses the official `openai` SDK, which is fetch-based and runs on Workers without `nodejs_compat`. Create the client per request from `env.OPENAI_API_KEY`. To add caching, rate limiting, and spend visibility, point `baseURL` at a Cloudflare AI Gateway endpoint.

Keep the API key in a Worker secret, never in client code.
